history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with curly dark hair and sunglasses is sitting in a shopping cart on a crosswalk at night. He's wearing a black jersey with grey accents and the number "29" on the front, baggy grey cargo pants, and black and white sneakers. He's holding his sunglasses with his right hand. The background shows a street with storefronts, some with closed metal shutters and others with glass doors. There are parked motorcycles and a bicycle on the sidewalk. Streetlights illuminate the scene, casting a warm glow. The overall mood is urban, casual, and slightly edgy. The color palette consists of dark tones from the night, contrasted with the bright lights and the colors of the man's outfit. The image has a slightly grainy, street-photography aesthetic.
